370 J4C J4C_HIP_FRC_180_DA (J4C) Hip Fracture in Last 180 Days CHAR 1 Health conditions: accidents - hip fracture in last 180 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
371 J4D J4D_OTH_FRC_180_DA (J4D) Other Fracture in Last 180 Days CHAR 1 Health conditions: accidents - other fracture in last 180 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
372 J4E J4E_NONE_ABOVE (J4E) None of Above Accidents CHAR 1 Health conditions: accidents - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
